nasb.text: Therefore thus says the Lord God, ‘I have sworn that surely the nations which are around you will themselves endure their insults.

esv.text: Therefore thus says the Lord God: I swear that the nations that are all around you shall themselves suffer reproach.

cnv.text: 所以主耶和華這樣說：我舉手起誓說：你們四圍的列國必親自擔當自己的羞辱。

ccb.text: 所以我誓言要让你们四围的外族人也受羞辱。这是主耶和华说的。
